batch_objective: GAP #2 (batch-11 SCOPE-1, premise-corrected NET-NEW feature): give the project save an operator surface to assign per-variant change/check files (and optionally project-wide batch files), persist them into the manifest (write_project_manifest batch/assignments kwargs, manifest_writer.py:370), and prove the round-trip through the SHIPPED save handler (assign -> save -> reload project.json -> manifest.assignments non-empty + consumed by plan_variant_executions, variant_execution_service.py:526). Today app.py:3687 calls write_project_manifest with NO batch/assignments and there is no assignment UI; the writer's batch/assignments were tested only via direct kwargs (the SCOPE-1 gap).

carried_context.gap2_substrate_map: ProjectManifest (variant_execution_service.py:159): active_variant + batch:list[Path] + assignments:dict[str,list[Path]] (variant_id -> per-variant change/check file paths). Writer write_project_manifest (manifest_writer.py:370) + serialize_manifest (:224) accept batch:Sequence[str]=() + assignments:Mapping[str,Sequence[str]]=None (PROJECT-RELATIVE strings; _reject_unsafe_entry :178 refuses absolute/escaping). verify_written_manifest (:580) re-reads canonical project.json + compares in resolved-Path form, returns drift. SAVE GAP: app.py:3687 write_project_manifest(variant_set, project_dir, self.base_dir) + verify :3701 pass NO batch/assignments. SaveProjectPayload (screens.py:78) = parent_folder+project_name only; SaveProjectScreen (:125) no per-variant field; SelectVariantScreen (:233) is the reusable variant-list pattern. Consumer plan_variant_executions (variant_execution_service.py:526, reads :586-605): scope SCOPE_ASSIGNMENTS -> assignments[variant_id] only; else batch + assignments[variant_id]. Variant model VariantDescriptor (models.py:61) variant_id=filename stem; ProjectVariantSet (models.py:86). TEST GAP: test_tui_manifest_save.py:90 tests active_variant only (no through-save batch/assignments); test_manifest_verify.py has the direct-kwargs round-trip (TC-003a) = the SCOPE-1 coverage.
carried_context.scope1_lineage: batch-11 US-010 manifest writer SUPPORTS batch/assignments but tested only via direct kwargs; the save handler passes empty -> shipped artifact carried only active_variant. This is the A-5 surface-reachability class. GAP #2 closes it: an operator surface + save-path threading + a THROUGH-THE-SAVE-HANDLER round-trip AT (the black-box deliverable observed on disk in project.json).
carried_context.open_scoping_questions: Phase-0 decisions owed (operator): (Q1) surface = extend SaveProjectScreen with per-variant assignment rows, vs a dedicated 'assign variant files' screen decoupled from save; (Q2) persist assignments-only vs assignments + project-wide batch; (Q3) assignable file source = restrict to files already in the project workarea (project-relative, satisfies _reject_unsafe_entry), vs allow external files copied-in. These gate READY.
